headline: Expedia Group (EXPE) Stock May Be Undervalued After Hotel Connectivity Research
summary: Expedia Group stock has delivered a strong 129.7% return over the past three years, and the current valuation checks now suggest the shares still lean toward the cheap side rather than looking fully priced in. Over three years, a 129.7% gain puts Expedia Group among the stronger performers in online travel. This raises the question of how much upside is already reflected in the price. Efforts to make hotel partners more fully connected and reduce friction across its platform can support...
